description: Real-world school weekly newsletter digest with multiple future events buried in lengthy text

input_summary.subject: Feb 11, 2026 Digest: 1 new message from Walnut Creek School District today

events.title: Staff Development Day - No School
events.description: Staff development day, no school for students. Teachers learning about math curriculum updates and student writing.

events.title: President's Day Weekend - No School
events.description: President's Day weekend, no school Friday through Monday.

events.title: PTA Meeting
events.description: PTA meeting.

events.title: Hygiene Care Kits Assembly
events.location: Lamorinda Music, 81 Lafayette Cr, Lafayette, CA 94549
events.description: Free assembly event to build hygiene care kits for families in need, organized by Mindful Littles.

events.title: Lunar New Year Activities
events.description: Lunar New Year activities at lunch.

events.title: PTA Meeting
events.description: PTA meeting in the cafe.

events.title: Taste & Toast
events.description: WCEF fundraiser event.

events.title: Spring Break
events.description: Spring break, no school.

events.title: WCI Parent Informational Night
events.description: Parent-only informational night about Walnut Creek Intermediate for incoming 6th graders.

events.title: WCI Open House
events.description: Annual Open House - families invited to walk the campus, visit classrooms.

events.title: YouthTruth Survey Open (WCSD Family)
events.description: YouthTruth family survey for WCSD is live. Email body asks families to complete the YouthTruth Survey and notes it closes at midnight on February 27. (Calendar image shows 2-28; email text states closes Feb 27 — end date set to Feb 27 11:59pm). Link provided in email: ytsurvey.org/wcsdfamily26.

events.title: Walnut Heights Staff Development Day - No School
events.description: Staff Development Day at Walnut Heights — no school on February 12. (Noted in email and in the February calendar graphic.)

events.title: Walnut Heights No School - President's Day Weekend
events.description: No school for Walnut Heights during President's Day weekend (Feb 13–16). Email states 'there is no school tomorrow, Friday or next Monday' and the calendar graphic lists 13-16 President's Day Weekend - No School.

events.title: PTA Meeting (Walnut Heights) - February
events.description: Walnut Heights PTA meeting listed for February 19 at 7:00 PM (February calendar entry). No specific room/location given in the February entry.

events.title: PTA Meeting (Walnut Heights) - March (In the Cafe)
events.description: Walnut Heights PTA meeting on March 19 at 7:00 PM. Calendar graphic specifically notes '(In the Cafe)'.

events.title: Lunar New Year Activities (Lunch)
events.description: Lunar New Year activities will take place at lunch on February 23 (listed in the February calendar snapshot). Time specified as 'at lunch' (no exact clock time provided).

events.title: Hygiene Care Kits Assembly - Mindful Littles
events.location: Lamorinda Music, 81 Lafayette Cir, Lafayette, CA 94549
events.description: Free assembly event hosted by Mindful Littles: bundle hygiene care kits for families in need. Flyer lists Date/Time: Sunday, February 22, 4-5pm. Location: Lamorinda Music, 81 Lafayette Cir, Lafayette, CA 94549. Registration QR/flowcode provided on flyer.

events.title: Taste & Toast (WCEF) Fundraiser
events.description: Taste & Toast event (WCEF) on March 25 from 5:30–8:30 PM at Walnut Creek Downtown & Broadway Plaza. Flyer included in the digest.

events.title: WCI Parent-Only Informational Night
events.description: Parent-only informational night hosted by Walnut Creek Intermediate (WCI) on April 9 from 6:30–7:30 PM in the WCI gym. Content: learn about life at Walnut Creek Intermediate; PTA will share involvement opportunities. (Mentioned in the WH newsletter body.)

events.title: WCI Student Visit to Walnut Heights
events.description: Walnut Creek Intermediate administrative and counseling team will visit Walnut Heights students on April 14 at 1:45 PM to preview WCI experience and get students excited about middle school. (Mentioned in the newsletter; exact end time not provided.)

events.title: WCI Open House
events.description: Walnut Creek Intermediate annual Open House on May 21 from 6:30–8:00 PM. Families are invited to walk the campus, visit classrooms, and learn about learning at WCI. (Mentioned in the newsletter body.)

events.title: Spring Break - WCSD
events.description: Spring Break listed in the calendar snapshot as March 30 through April 3 (inclusive).
